inputs.prompt: [Image1] is a 9-panel storyboard of one scene in a golden-automata forge — use it as the reference for the world, the weary older bearded smith, the gold automata, and the palette; do NOT reproduce the grid, panels, or labels. Animate the FULL scene as one continuous ~14-second cinematic sequence that moves through all nine beats IN ORDER, with motivated camera transitions between them. Keep the SAME weary older smith and the SAME flat-topped cylindrical gold automaton design throughout. The beats: (1) WIDE ESTABLISHER — the cavernous forge, ranks of gold automata receding, the smith small at his station; slow dolly-in along the line to — (2) MEDIUM — the smith lifts a finished gold automaton off the line; push to — (3) CLOSE-UP — his weary lined face studying it; tilt down to — (4) INSERT — his hands cradling the automaton's gold face; rack to — (5) CLOSE-UP — the automaton's serene face, its eyes faintly waking; pull back to — (6) LOW ANGLE — the gold automata looming on the line; whip to — (7) DETAIL — a welder arm sparking on a gold seam; crane back to — (8) OVER-THE-SHOULDER — past a gold automaton down the long receding ranks; and finally pull wide to — (9) the smith alone before the silent ranks as a vast shadow gathers. Painterly concept-art, cool blue gloom, warm spark-light. Low forge hum, the hiss of a welder, the tick of cooling metal.
